---
title: "Numbers"
description: |
  In this lesson, we will practice numbers in German.
author:
  - Will Gammerdinger
date: 2026-05-30
categories: 
  - German
  - Numbers
keywords:
  - Counting
license: "CC BY-SA 4.0"
license-url: "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/"
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

Approximate time: 30 minutes

# Learning Objectives

In this lesson, the learner will:

  - Count to 100
  
# Counting to twelve

Similarly to English, the most difficult part of counting in German is learning the numbers one through twelve. Once you have those down and you are into the "teens", most of the numbers are trivial, so let's focus on counting to twelve first.

| Number | German | Number | German | Number | German |
|---|------|---|------|---|------|
| 1 | eins | 5 | fünf | 9 | neun |
| 2 | zwei | 6 | sechs | 10 | zehn |
| 3 | drei | 7 | sieben | 11 | elf |
| 4 | vier | 8 | acht | 12 | zwölf |

Exercise 1

1 -> 12

App German -> number

App number -> German

App German pronunciation -> number

Exercise 2

1 -> 100

App German -> number

App number -> German

App German pronunciation -> number
